title: Bankers Blanket Bond
definition: Bankers Blanket Bond is intended to cover a financial institution against possible cash risks. Who is this product for? This is suitable for businesses with cash flow risks.
benefits: Loss of money while in transit Employee infidelity resulting into loss of money Electronic/cybercrime Loss of money in the premises of the bank both during and out of business hours Professional indemnity
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
